original:
Bornanew tips his head, giving you a confused look. 

"The good captain here thought someone," he pauses to give you a consternated expression, "-might be taking advantage of Menes. $PlayerHeOrShe wants to eliminate all suspects."

"I, for one, insisted to Menes that you must be the victim of some terrible scheme, and that I would pray for you, and, better yet, as a Knight of Ludd carry out my sworn duty to protect the faithful and innocent alike."

Bornanew gives Pond a squeeze to emphasize how safe he is, now.

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkBad2a:"Ulmus is behind it. We should perform an active scan on his brain."
original: Ulmus is behind it. We should perform an active scan on his brain.

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkBad2b:"On second thought, I don't think Ulmus had anything to do with it."
original: On second thought, I don't think Ulmus had anything to do with it.

Bornanew tips his head, giving you a confused look.

"The captain here told me," he pauses to give you a consternated expression, "-he thought you were working for Pathers, to sell Menes a fake relic to cause discord and make off with his credits. The captain told me $playerHeOrShe wanted to test an invasive brain-interfacer $playerHeOrShe found in some ruin on the fringe to discover the truth inside your head."

Pond's eyes go wide at the mention of 'brain-interface'.

"I, for one," Bornanew says reassuringly, "insisted that the plan was crude and unnecessary. Surely you're the victim of a terrible scheme..."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkBad3a:"Ah... yes, that's right. We really should try the brain-interfacer."
original: Ah... yes, that's right. We really should try the brain-interfacer.

"I didn't know they were Pathers!" Pond shouts.

Bornanew pretends shock at the notion, looking at Ulmus and shaking his head.

"Or that it was a fake! I swear, I'm a legitimate entrepreneur! I've been set up. I have enemies, Menes has enemies, they- they must have set me up!"

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkBad4a:"Yet you ran. Right back to your Pather masters on Chalcedon."
original: Yet you ran. Right back to your Pather masters on Chalcedon.

Bornanew tips his head, giving you a confused look.

"Now's not the time to play coy, captain. Your illegal brain-interfacer," he stresses the words, "which you proposed could 'scientifically prove' Pond's connection to a Pather network with only 'minimal damage'."

Pond looks rapidly between you and Bornanew, both scared and confused. "Minimal da-" he begins, then shifts course to avoid the subject entirely. "I didn't know they were Pathers!" he pleads.

"Or that it was a fake! I swear, I'm a legitimate entrepreneur. There's no need for brain-scans or, or- I've been set up! I have enemies, Menes has enemies, they- they must have set me up!"

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkBad4a:"But you ran, Ulmus. Right back to your Pather masters here on Chalcedon."
original: But you ran, Ulmus. Right back to your Pather masters here on Chalcedon.
